surface_verification.justification: Version-metadata edit (root pyproject.toml 0.5.0->0.29.0) plus a comment-only generalization in master_stop_check.py. No user-experienceable surface (web/cli/api) and no functional code behavior changed. Verified via ruff, the master_stop_check + phase/plugin-hooks suites, uv venv provisioning from pyproject (proves the TOML still parses), and the F0 isolation leak-guard.

behaviors.behavior: Root pyproject.toml stays valid TOML and the project still provisions after the version bump to 0.29.0 (lockstep with marketplace + plugin manifests)
behaviors.evidence: uv run provisioned the .venv from pyproject without error during F0; uvx ruff@0.15.15 green; no test asserts the old 0.5.0

behaviors.behavior: master_stop_check recover-command formatting is unchanged (comment-only edit; path still quoted)
